collabInvite.body: {inviter} added you as a collaborator on the playlist “{playlist}”.
collabInvite.hint: You can now add and remove tracks.
collabInvite.subject: You were added to a Chordia playlist

footer.manage: You can turn these emails off in Chordia Settings → Notifications.

friendRequest.body: {name} wants to connect with you on Chordia.
friendRequest.heading: New friend request
friendRequest.subject: {name} sent you a friend request

passwordReset.body: Someone requested a password reset for your Chordia account.
passwordReset.ignore: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.
passwordReset.subject: Reset your Chordia password

verifyEmail.body: Please confirm your email address to finish setting up your account.
verifyEmail.heading: Welcome to Chordia
verifyEmail.subject: Verify your Chordia email
